name: Prosciutto Egg Muffins
servings: serves 6 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a muffin pan with muffin liners.
In a medium mixing bowl, whisk the eggs, milk, and oregano. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the egg mixture evenly into the muffin pan.
Even add some of the cherry tomatoes, ham, and feta cheese in each muffin.
